In the said Notification the following entries shall be substituted at Sl. No. 24, namely.- MEMBERS (d) Representatives of Employers under clause (d) of sub-section (1) of Section 5A. 24. Shri Balasubrahmanyam Kamarsu, Employers’ Representative [No. V-20012/1/2013-SS.II] MANISH KUMAR GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
